title: Brain Placement & Architecture Recon
summary: Reconnaissance mission. Inspect Minerva Console and recommend whether Brain should live inside the repo, in a separate repo, hybrid, or as a Git vault. Recommend one primary path with exact paths.

title: Create Brain Harness and Static Shell
summary: Build mission. Scaffold content/brain/, harness files, JSON registries, features/brain/ module, app/(console)/brain/** routes, and lightly reorganize the sidebar so Brain appears as a top-level section.
